business.name: Northwind
business.description: Northwind gives operations teams a live picture of their supply chain, so they can act before problems become outages.

audience: Heads of operations and supply-chain leads at mid-market manufacturers.

brand.voice: Direct sentences. Concrete claims. No jargon.

content.headline: See the problem before it ships
content.valueProposition: Northwind turns scattered operational data into one live picture — so your team acts early, not after the outage.

features.title: Live signal
features.body: Every feed in one place, updated continuously — no more stale spreadsheets.

features.title: Early warning
features.body: Anomaly alerts fire before a delay turns into a stockout.

features.title: Connects to everything
features.body: ERP, WMS, and logistics APIs, live in minutes.

features.title: Enterprise-ready
features.body: SOC 2, SSO, and role-based access out of the box.

pricingTiers.name: Starter
pricingTiers.description: For a single team getting started.

testimonials.quote: We caught a supplier delay four days early. That one alert paid for the year.
testimonials.author: Dana Reyes

testimonials.quote: Finally, one dashboard the whole floor trusts.
testimonials.author: Sam Okafor

faqs.question: How long does setup take?
faqs.answer: Most teams connect their first data sources and see live signal within a day.

faqs.question: Do you support on-prem systems?
faqs.answer: Yes — the Enterprise plan includes on-prem connectors and a dedicated integration engineer.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Northwind is SOC 2 Type II certified, with SSO and role-based access on every paid plan.
